training.title: Training & Certifications
training.subtitle: Structured programmes for teams and institutions adopting agentic AI and zero-trust engineering.
training.flagship_syllabus: Architecting atomic migrations and zero-trust edge topographies under Nigerian data-protection and financial-regulatory frameworks.

tracks.title: Corporate Track
tracks.description: Team upskilling in agentic AI and zero-trust engineering practice. Delivered on-site or remotely, tailored to your organisation's stack and regulatory context.
bullets: Hands-on workshops covering agent architecture, tool-use patterns, and orchestration
Zero-trust engineering practice: least-privilege access, sandboxed execution, audit-trail design
Migration planning for upcoming data-localisation requirements

tracks.title: University & Certification Track
tracks.description: Structured curricula delivered with institutional partners. Designed for students and professionals seeking formal credentials in AI infrastructure engineering.
bullets: Covers architecture, deployment, governance, and responsible-AI practice
Certificates issued by AiRevl or with partner institutions
Capstone projects using real-world regulatory scenarios with synthetic data

sections.heading: Who we are
paragraphs: AiRevl is a trading name of AI Revolution Partners Limited, registered in Nigeria. We engineer sovereign AI infrastructure for organisations operating in regulated industries.

sections.heading: What we build
paragraphs: Autonomous multi-agent systems with human oversight. Our platforms execute complex workflows end-to-end while keeping a human in the loop on every high-risk decision — no unsupervised action on sensitive data or irreversible operations.

sections.heading: How we work
paragraphs: Zero-trust engineering from the ground up. Every system we deliver operates on least-privilege access, cryptographic audit trails, and sandboxed execution. Our public demonstrations run exclusively on synthetic data, bounded by mock-data contracts — they illustrate capability without exposing real systems or customer information.

sections.heading: Compliance posture
paragraphs: We build tools and infrastructure engineered to help organisations work toward their regulatory obligations. We do not claim or guarantee compliance on anyone's behalf.

sections.heading: Who we are
sections.body: This website is operated by {legal_name} (RC {rc_number}), trading as {company_name}.

sections.heading: Informational only
sections.body: Content on this site describes our services and does not constitute legal, regulatory, or professional advice. Engaging us happens under a separate written agreement.

sections.heading: Demos
sections.body: Interactive demonstrations run on synthetic data. They illustrate capability and do not represent any real system, customer, or regulatory outcome.

sections.heading: No compliance guarantee
sections.body: Our tools and services are engineered to help organisations work toward their regulatory obligations. Nothing on this site promises or guarantees regulatory compliance.

sections.heading: Intellectual property
sections.body: The {company_name} name, logo, and site content belong to {legal_name}. Don't reproduce them without permission.

sections.heading: Acceptable use
sections.body: Don't attempt to disrupt, probe, or misuse this site or its forms.

sections.heading: Liability
sections.body: To the extent the law permits, we accept no liability for loss arising from reliance on site content.
